title: Vessel No. 12
subtitle: Stoneware — 2024
description: A single wheel-thrown form, unglazed at the foot to let the raw clay speak. Fired in a wood kiln over eighteen hours.

title: Vessel No. 14
subtitle: Porcelain — 2024
description: Cast from a hand-carved plaster mold, then altered while leather-hard to soften every edge.

title: Study in Ash Glaze
subtitle: Stoneware — 2023
description: Ash gathered from the studio hearth, sieved and suspended for a glaze that pools where gravity allows.

title: Vessel No. 19
subtitle: Stoneware — 2025
description: A quiet, low form. Thrown off the hump, trimmed twice, and left to speak for itself.

title: Paired Forms
subtitle: Porcelain — 2025
description: Two vessels thrown from the same block of clay, fired together, never separated since.
